active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Phase 6 must turn Phase 5 unsupported-answer evidence into a real public-benchmark answer citation contract without changing v3 default or kernel opt-in.

benchmark_smoke_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_public_benchmarks.py tests/test_evals.py tests/test_agent_answer_eval.py -q
milestone_eval_commands: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30 --llm-answer --llm-judge --comparison-report .memoryos/evals/phase5_repeat_20260522_1315_lme_30_longmemeval.json --run-id phase6_answer_contract_lme_30

MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30 --llm-answer --llm-judge --comparison-report .memoryos/evals/phase5_repeat_20260522_1315_locomo_30_locomo.json --run-id phase6_answer_contract_locomo_30
usable_ack_checklist: active goal cited in brainstorm, plan, result, review verdict, and ack
context bundle cited by plan, execute, and review outputs
answer citation contract wired into real public benchmark memoryos_lite path
failing tests added and verified RED before implementation
full pytest and ruff pass or blockers recorded
LongMemEval and LoCoMo case-level movement reported separately
review_focus: Do not accept prompt-only change as architecture unless tests enforce the citation contract.
Check citations cannot reference unselected/unrendered sources.
Check deterministic no-LLM diagnostics remain meaningful.
Check LoCoMo-specific temporal/date/session evidence is not hidden by aggregate pass rate.
Check stale pre-context-bundle phase-6 artifacts were superseded.
Check GOD_ADJUST repeat scope: conv-26_qa_028 source recovery uses general neighbor/session preservation and not expected-answer leakage.
